title: MERC-Front
description: A Modpack designed to add FPS-style PVP inspired by round-based shooters to Minecraft Powered by BlockFront.
body:
# MERC-Front
MERC-Front is a community-run, third-party modpack built around [BlockFront](https://modrinth.com/mod/blockfront). It is designed for structured multiplayer gameplay, custom-built maps, and organized events, rather than traditional Minecraft survival or progression-based gameplay. Gameplay focuses on FPS-style, match-based combat with class-based loadouts and objective-driven game modes. The modpack supports a wide range of themes, from historical settings (including WWII) to sci-fi and experimental environments, depending on the maps and events being hosted.

## What This Modpack Is For

### ✔ Designed for
- Multiplayer match-based gameplay
- Custom maps with diverse themes
- Community-run servers and creative map building
- Organized matches and testing environments
  
### ✖ Not designed for
- Survival playthroughs
- Vanilla-style progression
  
Many items do not have crafting recipes, making survival gameplay impractical and unsupported.

## Servers and Matchmaking

### Core Gameplay

MERC-Front adds FPS-style combat mechanics and structured multiplayer gameplay inspired by round-based shooters.

⚠️ Matchmaking has to be set up manually on a server and is not available in single-player mode. As an alternative, you can play on the official servers. If you want to set up your own server, it is recommended that you use this mod list [MERC-Front Server Side Mods](https://modrinth.com/collection/RcILrQnt) instead of the modpack, although the modpack is also compatible.

### Game Modes

The modpack supports multiple multiplayer game modes, including:

- Domination
- Conquest
- Free For All
- Team Deathmatch
- Gun Game
- Trouble Town
- Infected

### Classes

Players select from multiple gameplay classes with defined roles in matches. Current classes include:

- Rifle
- Lt. Rifle
- Assault
- Support
- Medic
- Sniper
- Gunner
- Anti-Tank
- Commander
- **_Specialist Class coming soon!_**

### Maps

Currently there are over 24 playable maps each with its own layout and theme, with more on the way.

⚠️ These maps can only be accessed via the official servers and are not included in the modpack.

### Current state
- Official server Network with matchmaking server and Map building server
  
There is no always-online public matchmaking server until 18.4.2026 19:00.

### Work in progress
- custom skins for knives
- additional maps

### Powered by BlockFront
This modpack is powered by BlockFront, a Minecraft mod that provides the core systems for FPS-style, match-based gameplay. If you are looking for the official BlockFront experience, including their servers and matchmaking outside of MERC Front events, please refer directly to the BlockFront project page and their official community channels.
MERC Front operates independently and does not replace or represent the official BlockFront servers.

BlockFront project page: [BlockFront](https://modrinth.com/mod/blockfront)
  
### Anti-Cheat
To help maintain fair play during events and on community servers, MERC Front uses Pixel’s Anti-Cheat

Pixel’s Anti-Cheat project page: [Pixel’s Anti-Cheat](https://modrinth.com/mod/pixels-anticheat)

This is a third-party anti-cheat solution and is used to help ensure a fair and enjoyable multiplayer environment.

## Disclaimers
### Third-Party and Affiliation
MERC Front is a third-party, community-run project.
- Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the BlockFront development team
- Not affiliated with Mojang or Microsoft
- All referenced mods, names, and trademarks belong to their respective owners

This modpack and its servers operate independently and update separately from official BlockFront content.

### Content and Compliance
This project is provided solely for entertainment purposes.
Any references to weapons, historical events, or fictional conflicts are thematic and contextual within a game environment and do not promote or endorse real-world violence.
This modpack respects Modrinth’s content rules and modpack permission requirements. Mods are not redistributed without appropriate rights or licensing.
